summary: Superb GEMS soundboard captures an energetic '80s Dead set highlighted by a memorable Half Step jam.
review: JackStraw1965_95 raves about the high‑octane opening and steady drive of this mid‑'80s performance, calling out the unforgettable Half Step moment. The GEMS soundboard source is described as superb, delivering crystal‑clear, dynamic audio that lets the band’s excitement shine through.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review, but it praises both the musical performance and the recording quality highly; combined show (70%) and recording (30%) weighting yields a strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: GEMS soundboard praised as superb—clear, dynamic, and free of noticeable flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy start with the band “smoking” and keeping the foot on the accelerator throughout; momentum stays strong.
